keywords.metrics: metrics statistics analysis charts reports finances

errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

hero.description: Connect your Gmail, and let Money Tracker automatically extract, categorize, and track your expenses in real-time.

features.title: Everything you need for
features.subtitle: automated finance tracking
features.description: Powerful features designed to give you complete visibility without the manual data entry.

gmail.title: Gmail Integration
gmail.description: Real-time email processing. Stop manual entry and let Money Tracker watch your inbox for receipts.

ai.title: AI Extraction
ai.description: Powered by xAI Grok to accurately extract amounts, merchants, dates, and auto-categorize expenses.

currency.title: Multi-Currency
currency.description: Effortlessly track expenses in multiple currencies with live exchange rates and comparative analytics.

documents.title: Document Uploads
documents.description: Drag-and-drop PDFs and images for instant AI extraction of offline receipts.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Automatic detection and monitoring of your recurring payments and digital subscriptions.

security.title: Secure & Private
security.description: Read-only access to your emails. Data is encrypted at rest and never shared.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Stop wasting hours spreadsheeting your life. Money Tracker automates the tedious parts of personal finance so you can focus on building wealth.

step1.title: Connect Account
step1.description: Securely link your Gmail via OAuth. We only ask for the permissions needed to read receipt emails.

step2.title: AI Extraction
step2.description: Our AI instantly processes new emails and uploaded documents to extract precise financial data.

step3.title: Gain Insights
step3.description: View beautiful charts, categorize expenses effortlessly, and take control of your spending.

cta.title: Ready to see it in action?
cta.description: Join today and let Money Tracker import your last 3 months of transaction emails automatically.
cta.footer: No credit card required. Setup takes 2 minutes.

step1.title: Welcome to Money Tracker
step1.description: We will guide you through each section of the app the first time you visit it. You can skip the tutorial at any time with the X button.

step2.title: Real-time notifications
step2.description: This bell shows your notifications. When the AI processes your emails and detects transactions, it notifies you instantly. The red badge shows how many you have not read yet.

step3.title: Quick actions
step3.description: From here you can add a transaction manually, connect your Gmail, force an email sync, or go directly to the transactions list.

step4.title: Status panel and AI activity
step4.description: This panel shows the status of your connections and pending tasks (like reconnecting Gmail). On the right you can see AI activity over the last 7 days: emails processed, transactions found, and emails skipped.

step5.title: Main navigation
step5.description: The sidebar gives you access to all sections: Dashboard, Transactions, Subscriptions, Metrics, and Settings. Each section has its own tutorial that activates the first time you visit it.

step1.title: Transaction filters
step1.description: Filter by service name, type (income/expense), category, currency, or Gmail account. Combine multiple filters and sort by creation date or transaction date.

step2.title: List and detail
step2.description: The list loads 10 at a time with infinite scroll. Click a transaction to see the full detail, edit it, or delete it.

step3.title: Add transactions
step3.description: With the + button you can add a transaction manually or upload a document (PDF or image up to 5 MB) and the AI will extract the data automatically.

step1.title: AI-detected subscriptions
step1.description: The AI analyzes your transactions and automatically detects recurring services like Netflix or Spotify. It shows frequency, average amount, and the next estimated billing date. It needs at least 2 charges from the same service to appear.

step1.title: Metrics filters
step1.description: Choose the period (30, 90, or 365 days), pick a specific month, and select the currency. If you have transactions in more than one currency, select 'All' to see a comparison between them.

step2.title: Charts and analysis
step2.description: See income, expenses, net balance, and average transaction with variation compared to the previous period. The monthly trend and category breakdown charts are interactive.

step1.title: Connect Gmail
step1.description: Here you connect your Gmail account so the AI can automatically analyze your financial emails. You can connect multiple accounts, import emails manually, or disconnect an account at any time.

step2.title: Interface language
step2.description: Switch the app language between Spanish and English. The change is immediate and does not require a page reload.

step3.title: Push notifications
step3.description: Enable push notifications to receive alerts on this device even when the app is not open.
step3.unsupported: Your browser does not support native push notifications. To enable them, install the app as a PWA: in Chrome click the install icon in the address bar, or in Safari use 'Add to Home Screen' from the share menu.

step4.title: Notification preferences
step4.description: Control exactly which notifications you receive: new transactions, import errors, Gmail reconnect alerts, and more. You can mute any type individually.

panel.title: Tutorials
panel.description: Each section of the app has its own tutorial that activates the first time you visit it.

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.content: Federico Deniard, independent developer. For any questions regarding this privacy policy, you can contact me at fededeniard@gmail.com.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.intro: Money Tracker collects the following personal data to operate:
items: Authentication data: email address, name (if using Google OAuth), and encrypted password.
Financial transaction data: amounts, merchants, categories, dates, and descriptions extracted from your emails.
Uploaded documents: PDFs and images you voluntarily upload for transaction extraction.
Gmail data: read-only access to process receipt and transaction emails. OAuth tokens are stored encrypted.
Notification preferences: push notification settings and per-type preferences.
Tutorial state: language preference and tutorial progress saved in localStorage.

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.content: Your data is used exclusively to: (a) authenticate and manage your account, (b) automatically extract and categorize financial transactions from Gmail and uploaded documents, (c) display metrics and analysis of your finances, (d) send you relevant notifications (new transactions, connection alerts), and (e) improve the service through AI performance analysis.

aiProcessing.title: AI Processing
aiProcessing.content: Emails and documents you upload are processed by xAI (Grok) to extract financial information. We also use Langfuse for observability and tracing of AI extractions, to diagnose errors and improve system accuracy. We do not use your data to train AI models nor share it with third parties for commercial purposes.

thirdParties.title: Third Parties
thirdParties.intro: Money Tracker uses the following third-party services to operate:
items: Supabase: PostgreSQL database, authentication, and serverless functions provider. Data is stored on Supabase servers with encryption at rest.
Google (Gmail API): read-only access to read transaction emails. We use the gmail.readonly and userinfo.email scopes.
xAI (Grok): AI processing to extract financial data from emails and documents.
Langfuse: observability platform to monitor and debug AI extractions.
Web Push API: native browser push notifications. No third-party services are used for push.

security.title: Security
security.content: We implement the following security measures: database encryption at rest (Supabase), Gmail OAuth tokens stored in encrypted columns, Row-Level Security (RLS) policies ensuring each user can only access their own data, HTTPS communication with CSP headers, and authentication sessions with automatic token refresh.

localStorage.title: Local Storage and Cookies
localStorage.content: Money Tracker does not use tracking or advertising cookies. We use browser localStorage only to save your language preference and interactive tutorial state. There are no trackers, analytics, or third-party pixels.

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.content: Push notifications are opt-in. If enabled, your browser receives alerts about new processed transactions, import errors, and Gmail connection reminders. You can disable them at any time from the Settings section.

retention.title: Data Retention and Deletion
retention.content: Your financial transactions are kept while you have an active account. You can delete individual transactions at any time (soft delete). When disconnecting your Gmail account, OAuth tokens are deactivated and the deactivation is permanently logged. If you delete your account, all associated data is removed. Token deactivation logs are retained for security purposes.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: As a user, you have the following rights regarding your data:
items: Access: you can view all your data at any time from the application.
Rectification: you can edit and correct your transactions.
Erasure: you can delete individual transactions or your entire account.
Portability: you can request a copy of your data by emailing me.
Consent withdrawal: you can disconnect Gmail at any time from Settings.
Objection: you can opt out of push notifications by disabling them in Settings.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding your personal data, you can write to fededeniard@gmail.com. I will respond promptly.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: This privacy policy may be updated periodically. Changes will be published at this same URL. I recommend reviewing it from time to time to stay informed.
